tasks.label: Smoke test hyperlocal endpoints
tasks.command:
set -u

BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3100
FOXTROT=http://127.0.0.1:8091

echo 'HEALTH:'
curl -sS -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" "$BASE/health" | head -c 300; echo

echo 'NETWORK_FARMS:'
curl -sS -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" "$BASE/api/wholesale/network/farms" | head -c 300; echo

echo 'CATALOG:'
curl -sS -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" "$BASE/api/wholesale/catalog?limit=1" | head -c 400; echo

echo 'FOXTROT_INVENTORY_SAMPLE:'
curl -sS -w "\nHTTP:%{http_code}\n" "$FOXTROT/api/wholesale/inventory" | head -c 300; echo

tasks.label: Smoke test buyer auth + order notification
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail

BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3100
FOXTROT=http://127.0.0.1:8091
EMAIL="smoke+$(date +%s)@local.test"
PASS="test1234"

echo "EMAIL:$EMAIL"

echo 'UPSERT_NETWORK_FARM:'
curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/network/farms" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{"farm_id":"light-engine-demo","name":"Light Engine Demo Farm","api_url":"http://127.0.0.1:8091","status":"active"}' | head -c 240; echo

REG=$(curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/buyers/register" \
   -H 'content-type: application/json' \
   -d "{\"businessName\":\"Smoke Co\",\"contactName\":\"Smoke Buyer\",\"email\":\"$EMAIL\",\"password\":\"$PASS\",\"buyerType\":\"restaurant\",\"location\":{\"zip\":\"12345\",\"state\":\"NY\",\"lat\":40.73,\"lng\":-73.93}}")

echo 'REGISTER_RESPONSE:'
echo "$REG" | head -c 240; echo

TOKEN=$(node -p "JSON.parse(process.argv[1]).data.token" "$REG")
echo "TOKEN_PREFIX:${TOKEN:0:20}"

SKU_ID=$(curl -sS "$FOXTROT/api/wholesale/inventory" | jq -r '.lots[] | select((.qty_available // 0) > 0) | .sku_id' | head -n 1)
echo "USING_SKU:$SKU_ID"

PREVIEW=$(curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/checkout/preview" \
  -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"cart\":[{\"sku_id\":\"$SKU_ID\",\"quantity\":1}],\"recurrence\":{\"cadence\":\"one_time\"},\"sourcing\":{\"mode\":\"auto_network\"}}")

echo 'PREVIEW_RESPONSE:'
echo "$PREVIEW" | head -c 360; echo

EXEC=$(curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/checkout/execute" \
  -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"buyer_account\":{\"email\":\"$EMAIL\",\"name\":\"Smoke Buyer\"},\"delivery_date\":\"2026-01-05\",\"delivery_address\":{\"street\":\"1 Test St\",\"city\":\"Testville\",\"zip\":\"12345\"},\"cart\":[{\"sku_id\":\"$SKU_ID\",\"quantity\":1}],\"payment_provider\":\"demo\",\"sourcing\":{\"mode\":\"auto_network\"}}")

echo 'EXECUTE_RESPONSE:'
echo "$EXEC" | head -c 360; echo

sleep 1
echo 'FOXTROT_ORDER_EVENTS (tail):'
curl -sS "$FOXTROT/api/wholesale/order-events" | tail -c 600; echo

tasks.label: Test inventory reservation system
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail

cd /Volumes/CodeVault/Projects/Light-Engine-Foxtrot

# Kill existing servers
lsof -ti tcp:8091 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || true
lsof -ti tcp:3100 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -TERM 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1

# Start Foxtrot
PORT=8091 node server-foxtrot.js > /tmp/foxtrot-reserve-test.log 2>&1 &
FOXPID=$!
echo $FOXPID > /tmp/foxtrot-reserve.pid

# Start Central
cd greenreach-central
PORT=3100 WS_PORT=3101 node server.js > /tmp/grc-reserve-test.log 2>&1 &
GRCPID=$!
echo $GRCPID > /tmp/grc-reserve.pid

sleep 3

# Load first active farm API credential
cd /Volumes/CodeVault/Projects/Light-Engine-Foxtrot
FARM_AUTH=$(node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='public/data/farm-api-keys.json'; const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const e=Object.entries(m).find(([,v])=>v&&v.status==='active'&&v.api_key); if(!e){process.exit(2);} process.stdout.write(e[0]+' '+e[1].api_key);")
FARM_ID=$(printf '%s' "$FARM_AUTH" | awk '{print $1}')
API_KEY=$(printf '%s' "$FARM_AUTH" | awk '{print $2}')

echo "Using farm auth: $FARM_ID"

echo '=== Testing Inventory Reservation System ==='
echo
echo '1. Check Foxtrot inventory (before reservation):'
curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/wholesale/inventory | jq -r '.lots[0] | "SKU: \(.sku_id), Available: \(.qty_available), Reserved: \(.qty_reserved)"'

echo
echo '2. Reserve 1 case of first in-stock SKU:'
SKU_ID=$(curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/wholesale/inventory | jq -r '.lots[] | select((.qty_available // 0) > 0) | .sku_id' | head -n 1)
curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/wholesale/inventory/reserve \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H "X-Farm-ID: $FARM_ID" \
  -H "X-API-Key: $API_KEY" \
  -d "{\"order_id\":\"test-order-$(date +%s)\",\"items\":[{\"sku_id\":\"$SKU_ID\",\"quantity\":1}]}" | jq '.'

echo
echo '3. Check inventory again (should show reduced available):'
curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/wholesale/inventory | jq -r '.lots[0] | "SKU: \(.sku_id), Available: \(.qty_available), Reserved: \(.qty_reserved)"'

echo
echo '4. View active reservations:'
curl -sS -H "X-Farm-ID: $FARM_ID" -H "X-API-Key: $API_KEY" http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/wholesale/inventory/reservations | jq '.reservations | length' | xargs echo 'Active reservations count:'

echo
echo '=== Test Complete ==='
echo 'Foxtrot log: tail /tmp/foxtrot-reserve-test.log'
echo 'Central log: tail /tmp/grc-reserve-test.log'

tasks.label: Smoke test delivery quote endpoint
tasks.command:
BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3100
EMAIL="quote.task.$(date +%s)@local.test"
PASS="test1234"

REG=$(curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/buyers/register" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "{\"businessName\":\"Quote Task\",\"contactName\":\"Quote Buyer\",\"email\":\"$EMAIL\",\"password\":\"$PASS\",\"buyerType\":\"restaurant\",\"location\":{\"zip\":\"12345\",\"state\":\"NY\",\"lat\":40.73,\"lng\":-73.93}}")
TOKEN=$(node -p "JSON.parse(process.argv[1]).data.token" "$REG")

PREVIEW=$(curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/checkout/preview" -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"cart":[{"sku_id":"SKU-AUDIT-GENOVESE-BASIL-5LB","quantity":1}],"recurrence":{"cadence":"one_time"},"sourcing":{"mode":"auto_network"}}')
SUBTOTAL=$(node -p "JSON.parse(process.argv[1]).data.subtotal" "$PREVIEW")

echo "EMAIL:$EMAIL"
echo "SUBTOTAL:$SUBTOTAL"

echo 'QUOTE_DELIVERY:'
curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/delivery/quote" -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "{\"subtotal\":$SUBTOTAL,\"zone\":\"ZONE_A\",\"requested_window\":\"morning\",\"fulfillment_method\":\"delivery\"}" | head -c 260; echo

echo 'QUOTE_PICKUP:'
curl -sS -X POST "$BASE/api/wholesale/delivery/quote" -H "authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'content-type: application/json' -d "{\"subtotal\":$SUBTOTAL,\"fulfillment_method\":\"pickup\"}" | head -c 260; echo
